signals.title: The Vacation Mini
signals.summary: This trend brings pure serotonin. Think dazzling materials, smocked bodices, halter ties, and prints that look like they belong in a cocktail glass. These minis are all about fun-whether you're dancing barefoot on a beach or just pretending you are.
signals.normalized_text: the vacation mini this trend brings pure serotonin. think dazzling materials, smocked bodices, halter ties, and prints that look like they belong in a cocktail glass. these minis are all about fun-whether you're dancing barefoot on a beach or just pretending you are. summer vacation vacation summer

signals.title: Fairy Sleeves
signals.summary: Soft, fluttery, and a little bit whimsical, fairy sleeves are having a major moment. These ethereal mini and midi dresses come with sleeves that catch the breeze and feel like a gentle nod to all things romance.
signals.normalized_text: fairy sleeves soft, fluttery, and a little bit whimsical, fairy sleeves are having a major moment. these ethereal mini and midi dresses come with sleeves that catch the breeze and feel like a gentle nod to all things romance. airy romantic summer summer

signals.title: All Things Polka Dots
signals.summary: Yes, polka dots are trending again-and yes, they feel totally fresh. Whether you go micro-dot or oversize print, a dotted dress instantly adds charm to any outfit. The modern take?
signals.normalized_text: all things polka dots yes, polka dots are trending again-and yes, they feel totally fresh. whether you go micro-dot or oversize print, a dotted dress instantly adds charm to any outfit. the modern take? summer summer

signals.title: The Exaggerated Drop Waist
signals.summary: This silhouette is making a serious comeback, and the update feels surprisingly cool. Drop-waist dresses with dramatic volume or structure are popping up everywhere, giving a nod to both '80s glamour and ballet-inspired elegance.
signals.normalized_text: the exaggerated drop waist this silhouette is making a serious comeback, and the update feels surprisingly cool. drop-waist dresses with dramatic volume or structure are popping up everywhere, giving a nod to both '80s glamour and ballet-inspired elegance. summer summer

signals.title: Sheer Printed Midis
signals.summary: Sheer is no longer just for edgy moments-it's been reimagined into chic, soft printed dresses that strike the perfect balance between playful and polished.
signals.normalized_text: sheer printed midis sheer is no longer just for edgy moments-it's been reimagined into chic, soft printed dresses that strike the perfect balance between playful and polished. airy summer summer
